app.title: Brain Challenge
app.welcomeDesc: Test your intelligence with 110 math and logic questions across 5 progressive levels. Answer accurately, collect points, and climb the challenge ladder!

levels.selectDesc: Choose the level you want to start from

results.legendary: Legendary performance! You are a true genius.
results.excellent: Excellent! Your math skills are amazing.
results.thanks: Thanks for participating! Try again to improve your score.

feedback.alreadyCorrectPrev: You already answered this question correctly!

questions.q: What is the next number in the series: 5, 10, 20, 40, … ?
Two numbers sum to 20 and differ by 4, one is 8, what is the other number?
A square has an area of 144, what is the length of its side?
A right triangle has sides 5 and 12, what is the hypotenuse?
A number multiplied by 4 then plus 8 equals 40, what is the number?
A 2×3 grid of squares, how many rectangles are possible?

What is the sum of numbers from 1 to 20?
